abilities.description: When you raise your shield, roll +edge or +wits. On a strong hit, set your shield to 5. On a weak hit, make it 3. Then, if you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm}, suffer that harm as -shield and any remaining as -health. Raised shields last for a few minutes. If reduced to 0, they cannot be raised again for an hour or so.

You may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Fire} by letting your shield take the blow. If you do, roll +shield. Then, suffer -shield by the harm you would have suffered and ignore any remaining.
When you raise your shield, you may reroll one challenge die. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} with it, add +1.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm}, ignore harm up to the value of your shield and suffer -1 shield.

system.description: A device that creates an energy shield around the user.
